title: Cytokinetics' Myqorzo Succeeds in Non-Obstructive HCM Trial
headline: Cytokinetics' Myqorzo scores in non-obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy trial, opening multibillion-dollar market opportunity where BMS Camzyos lacks data.
key_facts: Non-obstructive HCM patient population; multibillion-dollar market opportunity; differentiates from Camzyos

title: Pfizer Scraps Final Trillium CD47 Program — $2.3B Failure
headline: Pfizer abandons second and final clinical-stage CD47 blocker from its $2.3 billion Trillium Therapeutics acquisition, marking complete write-off.
key_facts: $2.3 billion acquisition price; both clinical-stage CD47 blockers scrapped; CD47 target failing across multiple companies

title: Pfizer Q1 Earnings Beat; Bourla Rules Out Mega-Mergers
headline: Pfizer beats Q1 earnings and revenue estimates with stock up 2.2%; CEO Bourla explicitly rules out mega-merger strategy.
key_facts: Stock up 2.2%; beat Q1 earnings and revenue forecasts; reaffirmed 2026 guidance; COVID franchise supporting guidance

title: Madrigal Boosts MASH Pipeline with $1B Arrowhead Deal
headline: Madrigal licenses Arrowhead drug J&J declined in deal worth up to $1 billion in biobucks to expand MASH pipeline.
key_facts: Up to $1 billion in biobucks; asset previously declined by J&J; Madrigal maker of Rezdiffra (first approved MASH drug)

title: BioNTech Exits Multiple Sites; 1,800+ Jobs Impacted
headline: BioNTech announces manufacturing scale-down and site exits impacting over 1,800 jobs amid post-COVID rightsizing.
key_facts: 1,800+ jobs impacted; multiple site exits; manufacturing scale-down; pivot toward oncology pipeline

title: Intercept's Next-Gen FXR Agonist Fails Phase 2
headline: Intercept Pharmaceuticals' next-generation FXR agonist fails Phase 2, deepening competitive disadvantage versus Madrigal in MASH.
key_facts: Phase 2 failure; FXR agonist class (same mechanism as ocaliva/OCA); Italian-owned (Alfasigma)

title: Viridian's TED Drug Racks Up Another Phase 3 Win
headline: Viridian Therapeutics' thyroid eye disease candidate scores another Phase 3 victory, building case against Horizon/Amgen's Tepezza.
key_facts: Another Phase 3 win; competing against Tepezza (~$2B+ franchise); multiple Phase 3 wins strengthening positioning

title: Axsome Projects Auvelity Peak Sales at $8 Billion
headline: Axsome projects peak sales of $8 billion for Auvelity following FDA label expansion into Alzheimer's disease agitation.
key_facts: $8 billion peak sales projection; recent FDA expansion into Alzheimer's disease agitation; expands addressable population beyond MDD

title: Vertex Drops Moderna-Partnered Inhaled CF Candidate
headline: Vertex discontinues inhaled cystic fibrosis candidate developed in partnership with Moderna.
key_facts: Inhaled CF candidate; Moderna partnership; mRNA-based approach; rare setback for Vertex CF dominance

title: Passage Bio Cuts 75% of Workforce After FDA Block
headline: Passage Bio slashes 75% of workforce following FDA clinical hold on gene therapy program.
key_facts: 75% headcount reduction; FDA clinical hold/block; gene therapy company

title: Gilead Lays Off Arcellx Staff in California Post-Buyout
headline: Gilead lays off Arcellx employees in California following acquisition, executing post-M&A cost-cutting.
key_facts: Gilead acquisition of Arcellx; California layoffs; cell therapy workforce consolidation

title: Sanofi Invests $294M in Toronto AI Hub
headline: Sanofi invests $294 million in Toronto-based artificial intelligence research hub.
key_facts: $294 million investment; Toronto location; AI-focused research

title: Novartis Cuts 220 Jobs, Closes German Site
headline: Novartis cuts 220 jobs and closes German manufacturing site as part of restructuring.
key_facts: 220 jobs cut; German site closure; manufacturing restructuring

title: Incyte's Jakafi XR Receives FDA Approval
headline: FDA approves Incyte's extended-release formulation Jakafi XR for myelofibrosis.
key_facts: Jakafi XR FDA approval; extended-release formulation; myelofibrosis indication

title: Supreme Court Grants One-Week Mifepristone Stay
headline: Supreme Court grants one-week stay on lower court order blocking mifepristone mail and pharmacy access.
key_facts: One-week SCOTUS stay; manufacturer Danco appealed within hours; mifepristone available through mail and pharmacies; duration unclear; major FDA authority implications

title: J&J's IBD Combo Fails Phase 2 But Advances
headline: Johnson & Johnson's inflammatory bowel disease combination therapy fails Phase 2 but will advance to pivotal testing.
key_facts: Phase 2 failure; pivotal testing advancement; IBD combination therapy; unexpected progression despite Phase 2 failure
